human_view.what_was_discovered: CHIRON recovered a 'linear_recurrence_order2' generator and PROVED it by predicting held-out terms it never saw — exact equality, not a tolerance.
human_view.why_believed: VERIFIED generator 'linear_recurrence_order2'. Recovered in EXACT arithmetic from the first 8 terms, this rule reproduces every term and predicts all 2 held-out terms exactly (== , not a tolerance). Compresses 88 bits to 24; MDL margin to the next model is 999 bits.
human_view.what_would_falsify: A single held-out term it failed to predict would break this.
human_view.residual: the generator reproduces the surface exactly; no residual.
